Contact Info

LocationQuiet location northwest of Hurghada. El Gouna approx. 10 km, Hurghada centre approx. 15 km, International Airport 20 km.
Phone+2 065 35020 53–58
+2 012 222806 31–36
Emailinfo@goldenbeachresort.net

ReceptionOpen 24 hours, 7 days a week

An innovative, contemporary hotel brand on Hurghada's Red Sea coast. Family-owned, family-run, and quietly proud of it since 1994.
